name: Spanish Garlic Soup#1 (Sopa De Ajo Caldosa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic cloves and fry until they turn golden brown.
2. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside. In the same skillet, add the bread cubes and fry until crispy.
3. Add the red pepper to the skillet and pour in the water. Return the garlic to the skillet.
4. Add salt to taste. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
5. In a bowl, beat the eggs and gently stir them into the soup. Mix well until fully incorporated.
6. Serve the soup hot in bowls.
